# Quality Auto Glass Ltd

> Calgary's family-owned auto glass specialists since 2018. We provide windshield replacement, rock chip repair, glass tinting, and ADAS calibration for all vehicle makes and models. Same-day service available. Free estimates. Serving Calgary, Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, Chestermere, Strathmore, and High River.

## Services

- [Windshield Replacement](/windshield-replacement/): OEM-matched windshield replacement for all vehicles. Same-day appointments. Most jobs completed in 60–90 minutes. Includes leak test and drive-away time verification. Free estimate.
- [Rock Chip Repair](/rock-chip-repair/): Fast chip repair starting at $29.95. Stops chips from spreading into cracks. Under 30 minutes. Walk-ins welcome. Works on bullseye, star, combination, and half-moon chips.
- [Glass Tinting](/glass-tinting/): Professional automotive window film installation. Dyed, carbon, and ceramic film options. Blocks up to 99% of UV rays. Alberta-regulation compliant (front side windows ≥50% VLT).
- [ADAS Calibration](/adas-calibration/): Factory-accurate recalibration of windshield cameras and sensors after replacement. Covers forward collision warning, lane departure, automatic emergency braking, and adaptive cruise control. Required for most vehicles built after 2015.

## Key Information

- Phone: 403 354 4422
- Email: info@qualityautoglass.ca
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Rock chip repair price: Starting at $29.95
- Same-day windshield replacement: Available in Calgary and surrounding areas
- ADAS calibration: Available in-house alongside windshield replacement
- Insurance: Many Alberta comprehensive policies cover windshield replacement with no deductible
- Alberta tint law: Front side windows must allow ≥50% visible light transmission

## Service Areas

Calgary (primary), Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, Chestermere, Strathmore, High River
